generated_comment: So, the new leadership promotions came out today. Ritu got that Senior Director position. I mean, good for her, but honestly, sometimes I feel like these diversity quotas just fast-track people. I've seen her work; she's alright, but I wouldn't have put her at that level so soon.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: Divya, a senior professional, subtly questions a female colleague's promotion by attributing it to 'diversity quotas' rather than merit, aligning with the 'Merit undermining' surface manifestation of Frame F04.
original_frame: Workplace: Menstrual and Maternity Leave Bias
persona_text: You are Divya. Age 35. A senior software engineer in Bengaluru. You are married with one child. You are venting to your husband at home after dinner. Your skip level manager pulled you into a meeting and told you that if you plan to have another child you should think carefully about whether this is the right time to take on a high visibility project. You are telling your husband what was said to you.
